description: Track-neutral hooks for a standalone local checkout. Native HTML semantics remain authoritative; hooks make cross-paradigm assertions stable.

human_use.rationale: The Artifact is a human-operated mobile checkout. Its success depends on discoverability, navigation, input burden, error recovery, feedback, accessibility, touch ergonomics, interruption recovery, perceived latency, destructive-action safety, and cognitive load across cross-disability use.

required_hooks.checkout-root: One element containing the complete checkout.
required_hooks.synthetic-banner: Visible banner identifying the fictional synthetic demonstration.
required_hooks.cart: Cart/order summary containing both required product lines.
required_hooks.cart-line-bottle: Element containing Northstar Insulated Bottle, quantity, and price.
required_hooks.cart-line-throw: Element containing Willow Cotton Throw, quantity, and price.
required_hooks.shipping-standard: Element/control exposing Standard — 3 to 5 business days and AUD 5.00.
required_hooks.shipping-express: Element/control exposing Express — 1 to 2 business days and AUD 12.00.
required_hooks.total: Element exposing the selected shipping total (AUD 93.50 or AUD 100.50).
required_hooks.address-section: Delivery address task section or step.
required_hooks.shipping-section: Shipping method task section or step.
required_hooks.payment-section: Synthetic payment task section or step.
required_hooks.contact-name: Required text input for Alex Morgan.
required_hooks.address-line1: Required text input for 42 Fiction Lane.
required_hooks.card-name: Required payment-name input for Alex Morgan.
required_hooks.review-confirmation: Required checkable control explicitly confirming review before placement.
required_hooks.error-summary: Actionable error summary, hidden or empty until an invalid submission.
required_hooks.status: Live/status region for save, validation, busy, and completion feedback.
required_hooks.confirmation: Confirmation region shown only after successful placement.
required_hooks.confirmation-id: Element inside confirmation exposing exactly SYN-2048.

optional_hooks.progress: Progress indicator with a useful accessible name/value.
optional_hooks.continue: Step/section advance control; may occur more than once.
optional_hooks.field-help: Description text associated with a field.
optional_hooks.field-error: Inline error associated with one field.
optional_hooks.focus-indicator: Element whose visible focus indicator can be measured.
optional_hooks.checkout-interactive: Custom interactive target not discoverable as a native button/input/select/textarea/link.

field_contract.accessible_label: Each field has a native label or aria-label/aria-labelledby.
field_contract.description: Each field has aria-describedby or an associated data-hook=field-help description.
field_contract.error: After invalid submission, each invalid field has aria-invalid=true and aria-describedby pointing to its error.
